subcodes.first_line: O thou who gazest upon the holy Kingdom of the All-Merciful! Though to all outward seeming the distances between stations and dwelling-places be a hundred stages, nay more [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناظر بملکوت قدس رحمانی اگرچه بظاهر فاصله مواقع و منازل صد مراحل بلکه
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @call to action, @firmness in the Covenant, @exalting the Word of God in teaching the Cause
